Worst-case performance across envelope:
  worst_pt_recovery:      0.5522
  worst_capture_mdot:     5.204 kg/s
  worst_thrust:           3.787 kN
  worst_M4:               0.439
  worst_Tt4:              2243.3 K
  worst_phi_effective:    0.750
  worst_max_height:       0.307 m
  combustor_volume:       0.038 m^3

Infeasibility reasons:
  - M=4.00 h=17000 aoa=-2.0: thrust 3.787 kN below minimum 4.000 kN at phi_effective=0.750
